# oms-start — LLM Reference

One-time project initializer. Ingests any starting material (idea, PRD, notes, URLs), runs departmental intake, generates all .claude/agents/ ctx files. Run once per project.

## Triggers — use /oms-start when

- New project needs OMS — no company-belief.ctx.md exists
- Major pivot requiring full ctx rebuild
- Adding a new department to an existing project

Never re-run on an active project unless rebuilding from scratch.
Use /oms discover to re-scan an existing project's file structure.

## Invocation

```
/oms-start                     # reads material already in project dir (README.md, IDEA.md, CLAUDE.md)
/oms-start <idea text>         # inline idea or description
```

## What it generates

All written to [project]/.claude/agents/:
- company-belief.ctx.md — vision, values, constraints
- product-direction.ctx.md — milestones with success criteria
- company-hierarchy.md — active departments and rostered agents
- ceo-decisions.ctx.md — standing CEO decisions log
- tech-stack.ctx.md — stack, dependencies, deploy targets (code projects)
- architecture.ctx.md — system design, data models, API contracts (code projects)

## What it doesn't do

- Never queues tasks — that's /oms-exec
- Never runs discussions — that's /oms
- Never modifies source code
